title: Final verification: typecheck, test, build all
description: After all phase 5 bug fixes: (1) `bun x tsc --noEmit` — should pass with no new errors; (2) `bun test` — should pass; (3) `bun run build:all` — should succeed; (4) verify all 3 dist outputs (index.cjs, stdio-server.mjs, http-server.mjs) exist; (5) print summary of changes. Document the test/build success as final verification.
validation: All 3 commands exit 0. Document any pre-existing errors that remain (and confirm they are NOT caused by this cleanup).
